title: Chaos Erupts from the Capital to Udon
description: On pages 15–17, this part focuses on Tama, Big Mom, Unknown person #13, Momonosuke, Luffy, Unknown person #14 as Yasuie’s execution exposes Wano’s cruelty as chaos spreads from the Flower Capital to Udon prison.
scene: The capital erupts after Yasuie’s death while Big Mom’s arrival throws Udon prison into chaos.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huh?! there's Oshiruko here?! That was just a bald-faced lie! It worked out?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was worried we wouldn't be able to get inside, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now we can save big brother Luffy, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: O-TAMA, STAY WITH MOMONOSUKE. THE BOTH OF YOU MUST HIDE.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: M- Mm. We have no choice.

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Indeed. Lord momonosuke, most of all,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The leader of this territory, UDon, is a headliner of the hundred beast pirates. Queen.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Let us proceed carefully. Come, chop- Paemon!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How do you guys have such blind faith in handkerchiefs tied across the face?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Are you going to fight her?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Yes! Please give me some. Quickly!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that if you come here, you can get some. We've come from very far!()

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You've gotta be freakin' kidding me. Who the hell would dare say such a thing?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You know Oshiruko is my favorite food! Are you trying to provoke me?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oi! Hold up! While you two are arguing, Spikey's gonna drown!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Argu- ing?! This isn't just arguing...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lord Queen! Please! Going against big mom when it comes to food is not a good idea!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: say, because the new "O-lin" is a nice version of big mom,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've got plenty of Oshiruko. But it's all mine.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You think that violent enemies might just scare her int-

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm not giving you a single drop, you old HAG!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "We actually don't have any left! What do we do?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Dragon Dragon Fruit Ancient Type, Model BRACHIONSAURUS

summary: This section advances the Wano - Yasuie’s Execution and Udon Chaos storyline with 48 dialogue beats. Yasuie’s sacrifice and Big Mom’s arrival turn Wano’s hidden resistance into open chaos.
